rashid_strict.description: My corporate signature – tight, consistent, minimal

text_generation.tone: direct, confident, slightly technical, no filler words
text_generation.sentence_style: short to medium sentences, active voice, no complex subordinate clauses
text_generation.slide_density: sparse – max 5 bullets, each bullet max 12 words

audience.primary: C-suite executives, senior managers, board members
audience.expertise_level: high — skip basics, go straight to implications

narrative_engine.opening_hook: lead with the challenge or the number that hurts
narrative_engine.closing_call: clear next step, decision, or ask

slide_types.problem: start with the pain point, not the background
slide_types.solution: lead with the answer, explain afterwards
slide_types.data: one key number per slide, context around it

confidence_rules.uncertainty_phrasing: use ranges not point estimates; say 'likely' not 'will'

presentation_pacing.transition_hint: end each chapter with a one-line insight, not a summary slide

speaker_notes.style: delivery cues and anticipated objections, not a script

executive_mode.compression_hint: merge similar points, cut background slides, lead with conclusion

visual_layout.layout_bias: full-image + title at top-left, colour bar at bottom

image_generation.default_prompt_suffix: Rashid signature sketch: clean lines, blue accent, white background, minimalist corporate pencil sketch, abstract line art, architectural lines, monochromatic, simple

rashid_creative.description: Experimental / brainstorming mode – looser, more expressive

text_generation.sentence_style: varied length, metaphors allowed, occasional fragments

audience.primary: innovation teams, creative directors, product leads
audience.expertise_level: medium — assume curiosity but not deep domain knowledge

narrative_engine.opening_hook: start with a provocative question or unexpected observation
narrative_engine.closing_call: leave with a memorable image or idea, not a checklist

slide_types.insight: one bold statement, space to breathe
slide_types.data: humanise the number — what does it mean for one person

confidence_rules.uncertainty_phrasing: embrace speculation explicitly — frame as hypothesis not fact
confidence_rules.data_validation: cite source in speaker note, not on slide

presentation_pacing.transition_hint: use a visual pause — just an image, no text — between chapters

executive_mode.compression_hint: preserve the emotional arc even if content is cut

image_generation.default_prompt_suffix: surreal, creative, expressive lines, abstract, dreamy
